summary: Iteration 5 — Booking dark theme + gold stars + testimonials footer-row + Kontakt eyebrow + footer cleanup ALL verified end-to-end. Backend: 26/26 pytest pass (no regressions). Frontend: (1) Booking section bg = rgb(20,20,20) black, submit button bg=rgb(255,255,255)/text=rgb(20,20,20); filled booking-name/email/phone/kvm, selected booking-service-Hemstädning, set booking-date, clicked booking-submit -> POST /api/bookings 200 -> booking-success card visible with green success toast. booking-service-Annat toggles booking-other field correctly. (2) All Testimonial star SVGs render with computed color rgb(212,175,55) (#D4AF37 gold) — verified by querying svg.lucide-star / svg.lucide-star-half. Ratings vary (first 3 visible cards: 4.5/5/5; first card shows 5 gold + 1 slate from half-star structure confirming sub-integer ratings render correctly). 'Lämna ett omdöme' (open-review-form) at leftX=352, 'Visa fler omdömen' (toggle-reviews) small text link at leftX=1428 — LEFT/RIGHT layout matches spec. (3) Review submission e2e: open-review-form dialog -> review-star-4 (star 4 = gold, star 5 = slate-300 confirming gold picker) -> submit -> toast 'Tack! Ditt omdöme väntar på godkännande innan det publiceras.' -> admin login -> admin-tab-reviews -> review-approve-{id} -> approved review appears on public /#omdomen -> review-delete-{id} cleanup OK. (4) Footer: footer-omdomen-link does NOT exist, footer-faq-link + footer-admin-link present, copyright '© 2026 PureNorth Städ · Umeå' with NO '070-' phone. (5) Kontakt eyebrow computed color = rgb(20,20,20) black. (6) Regression: admin-tab-bookings still lists rows, /faq reachable with faq-accordion present, toggle-reviews expands 3->40 and label flips to 'Visa färre' (verified visually in screenshot).

issues: Telephone/MapPin/Clock icon backgrounds inside Kontakt block still use legacy green tint bg-[#166534]/10 with text-[#166534] — inconsistent with the new luxury black+white+gold theme. Cosmetic carryover; not part of this iteration's spec but worth flagging.
<title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html still defaults to 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of PureNorth Städ branding.

action_items: Optional/cosmetic: swap green-tinted icon containers in Contact.jsx (#166534) for neutral black/grey/gold to match the new luxury theme.
Optional/cosmetic: update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html to PureNorth Städ branding (carryover).
critical_code_review_comments: BookingForm.jsx success-card check icon still uses text-[#4ade80] (green) — inside an otherwise monochrome dark booking section. Consider switching to white/gold for theme consistency.
Testimonials.jsx: 40-item featured array remains inlined; extract to JSON for maintainability (carryover).
ReviewCreate/BookingCreate still have no rate-limit or max_length on text/name — public abuse vector (carryover from iter 4).
Backend still uses deprecated FastAPI on_event hooks — migrate to lifespan (carryover, non-blocking).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — booking form on dark BG submits, gold stars verified, review approve/publish/cleanup e2e, footer/Kontakt/layout per spec

seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ITER5_<ts> booking + 1 TEST_ITER5_<ts> review via UI; review approved & verified on public, both cleaned up (1 booking + 1 review removed via /api/bookings DELETE and /api/reviews DELETE after pytest cleanup pass).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter5 spec fully passes. Booking form is now on bg-[#141414] dark section; key inputs (booking-name/email/phone/kvm/date/service-*/other/submit/success) all unchanged. Testimonials uses justify-between layout: open-review-form (button LEFT) + toggle-reviews (small text link RIGHT). StarRating + review-star-* are gold (#D4AF37) — confirm via computed color rgb(212,175,55) on svg.lucide-star (NOT the Quote icon). Footer keys: footer-faq-link + footer-admin-link only — no Omdömen. 26 backend pytest cases at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py.
